businessName.title: Business name
businessName.description: Used to sign SMS messages sent to customers.

googleReviewUrl.title: Google review link
googleReviewUrl.description: Where 4-5 star customers are sent after rating.

smsTemplate.title: SMS message template
smsTemplate.description: Supports {customer_name} and {business_name} placeholders. The review link is appended automatically.
smsTemplate.default: Hi {customer_name}! Thanks so much for choosing {business_name}. We'd really appreciate a quick review -- it means a lot to a small business like ours.

negativeFeedbackEmail.title: Negative feedback notification email
negativeFeedbackEmail.description: Where 1-3 star private feedback gets sent. Optional for v1.
